## Example 3: Class Member Addition with Default Constructor
Simplified srcML showing structural change:
<class name="ReusableStringStream">
  <member>int m_index;</member>
  <diff:insert><member>std::ostringstream* m_oss;</member></diff:insert>
  <diff:insert><constructor name="ReusableStringStream" member_init_list="m_index(...), m_oss(new std::ostringstream())"/> </diff:insert>
</class>

INTERPRETATION:
- <diff:insert>: New class member added (std::ostringstream pointer)
- <constructor name="ReusableStringStream">: Added a default constructor with initialized member m_oss (new std::ostringstream())
